How to read this: A <-> B means round trip, and A -> B -> C means different return airport. Cash rows are true two-leg fares; 2x cash rows add two one-way fares for comparison. Point value inputs change award effective USD. Score is lower-is-better and includes price plus timing, duration, and stop penalties.
Data mode: cached allowed. Cash details: 25/25 priced fares have verified return timing. One-way cash legs priced: 6/12; one-way cash options shown: 12; mixed cash+award plans: 72. Award legs shown: 12. Provider issues: 0.
